content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：「24」EP·寧靜的河流，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：「24」EP·寧靜的河流
無論下雪、下雨、晴天、陰天，今日的河水依然靜靜流淌。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST："「24」EP·Still the River Flows "was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："「24」EP·Still the River Flows"
Whether snow falls, rain weeps, sun blazes, or clouds brood—today, like all days, the river moves on, silent, untroubled.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜 OST：「24」EP·寧靜的河流
